text:
Created attachment 146491
Patch to update games/stonesoup to 0.15

Update to Dungen Crawl Stone Soup 0.15: “Storm Over Zot”[1]

Find attached the patch for games/stonesoup.
Find also attached the logs of two successful poudriere testport runs: one for games/stonesoup and one for its slave games/stonesoup-sdl.


[1] http://crawl.develz.org/wordpress/crawl-0-15-storm-over-zot
